summary: Lead to Project Conversion Bug Fix Verified - All 17 tests passed. The function name collision fix (renaming async generate_project_timeline_intelligent) is working correctly.
passed_tests: test_04_progress_lead_through_stages - Stage progression working (Lead Allocated -> Waiting for Booking)
test_07_convert_lead_to_project_success - CRITICAL: Lead conversion API working
test_09_verify_lead_marked_as_converted - Lead marked is_converted=True and linked to project
test_10_verify_project_timeline_generated - CRITICAL: Timeline generated during conversion (bug fix verified)
test_verify_existing_converted_lead - Existing lead_9fb8a84d verified as converted

bug_fix_verification.issue: Function name collision - async generate_project_timeline_intelligent() was overriding sync generate_project_timeline() helper function
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Renamed async function from generate_project_timeline to generate_project_timeline_intelligent at line 15695
evidence: Lead conversion API (POST /api/leads/{lead_id}/convert) returns 200 with project_id
Project document created with timeline array containing milestones
Timeline has correct structure with title, status, expectedDate fields
Existing converted lead (lead_9fb8a84d -> proj_b5e9610f) has timeline

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix correctly applied - sync generate_project_timeline() at line 6246 is now distinct from async generate_project_timeline_intelligent() at line 15695
Lead conversion flow properly validates: stage check -> payment confirmation -> conversion -> timeline generation
Project timeline is generated using the sync helper function during conversion (line 7522)
seed_data_creation: Created test lead TEST_ConversionLead_* which was converted to project during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead to Project conversion bug fix verified. The function name collision issue is resolved. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_lead_conversion.py can be used for regression testing of the conversion flow. Key endpoints tested: POST /api/leads/{lead_id}/convert, PUT /api/leads/{lead_id}/stage, PUT /api/leads/{lead_id}/confirm-booking-payment

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Function name collision in Python - async function generate_project_timeline_intelligent() at line 15695 was shadowing the sync helper function generate_project_timeline() at line 6246
rca_of_the_issue.impact: Lead conversion was failing because the sync helper function was being overridden by the async function, causing timeline generation to fail during conversion
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Renamed the async function from generate_project_timeline to generate_project_timeline_intelligent
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 17 tests pass, including critical tests for timeline generation during conversion
